mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.full_name as author_name, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.item_id = CAST(#{itemId} AS UUID) ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT c.*, u.full_name as author_name, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
mapper.insert:
SELECT uuid_generate_v4()
INSERT INTO comments ( id, item_id, parent_id, author_id, body, is_edited ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS UUID), CAST(#{itemId} AS UUID), CAST(#{parentId} AS UUID)NULL, CAST(#{authorId} AS UUID), #{body}, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET body = #{body}, is_edited = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comments WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_mentions (comment_id, mentioned_user) VALUES (CAST(#{commentId} AS UUID), CAST(#{mentionedUserId} AS UUID))
